thag4.8:1.2: I’m known as Rāhula the Fortunate:
thag4.8:1.3: because I’m the son of the Buddha,
thag4.8:1.4: because I’ve the eye that sees Dhammas,
thag4.8:2.3: I’m deserving of offerings, a worthy one
thag4.8:2.4: a three-knowledge man, one with sight of the deathless.
thag4.8:3.1: Those blinded by sensuality covered by the net,
thag4.8:3.2: veiled by the veil of craving,
thag4.8:3.3: bound by the Kinsman of the heedless,
thag4.8:3.4: are like fish in the mouth of a trap.
